title: feat: migrate model monitor to Pollinations UI
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Migrates Model Monitor to `@pollinations/ui` primitives and package-owned modality theme colors.
- Adds reusable UI primitives needed by the app: `Alert` and `Table`, plus chip/scroll/theme updates.
- Regenerates Model Monitor favicon/PWA/OG assets from the shared icon tooling with the violet UI theme.
- Keeps the UI showcase export so `apps/react` continues to build after merging `origin/main`.

Validation:
- `npx biome check --write packages/ui/src/theme.ts tools/icons/src/cli.js packages/ui/src/showcase/DesignShowcase.tsx packages/ui/src/showcase/index.ts packages/ui/package.json packages/ui/tsup.config.ts packages/ui/src/index.ts packages/ui/src/primitives/ScrollArea.tsx apps/model-monitor/src/App.jsx`
- `npm test --prefix packages/ui`
- `npm run build --prefix apps/model-monitor`
- `npm run build --prefix apps/react`

gist.headline: Violet vibes for Model Monitor
gist.blurb: The Model Monitor just got a major glow-up! We've migrated it to our official UI library, bringing a sleek new violet theme and buttery-smooth tables to your model-watching experience.
gist.summary: Migrated the Model Monitor app to use @pollinations/ui primitives, introducing new reusable Alert and Table components alongside a refreshed violet theme.
gist.impact: Users will see a cleaner, more cohesive interface when checking model status, and developers can now use the new Alert and Table primitives in their own apps.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee as a painter/designer, updating a retro computer monitor that displays a clean table layout with violet accents.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, touching up a retro computer monitor with a paintbrush. The monitor displays a neat, chunky pixel table layout with soft violet accents. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
